reviews.title: What Our Users Say
reviews.subtitle: Join thousands of solo entrepreneurs who trust AiBrand

review1.content: Finally an open-source tool that handles multi-platform publishing! One click to Douyin, TikTok, YouTube - saved me hours every week.

review2.content: As a solo entrepreneur, AiBrand is a game changer. AI generates content, auto-publishes, even handles comments. My social media runs itself now.

review3.content: The AI Agent feature is incredible. It writes, optimizes, and posts content automatically. Content costs dropped by 90%.

review4.content: Best part? It's open source. I can customize it for my brand. Covers all major platforms - domestic and international.

review5.content: Pay-per-view model makes so much sense. Only paying for actual results, not just content creation. Transparent and fair.

review6.content: Love the MCP tools integration. Video editing, translation, publishing - all AI-powered. Perfect for one-person businesses.

review7.content: Scan-to-post feature turned my customers into brand ambassadors. They love sharing and I get free marketing!

review8.content: Auto comment replies save me so much time. AI handles basic questions while I focus on growing my business.

review9.content: Supports 14+ platforms! From TikTok to WeChat, everything syncs automatically. True one-stop solution.

beliefs.title: Why Choose AiBrand
beliefs.subtitle: Built for solo businesses and small enterprises

belief1.title: Designed for Solo Businesses
belief1.description: Streamlined features, simple operations, results-oriented. No need to hire a large team or waste budget on ineffective promotions.

belief2.title: Full-Process AI Management
belief2.description: Planning, creation, optimization, publishing, and comment interaction—all automated. AI handles repetitive tasks while you focus on your business.

belief4.title: Pay As You Go, Transparent Pricing
belief4.description: No subscriptions, no hidden fees. Pay only for what you use, credits valid for 12 months, pricing aligned with upstream costs — zero markup.
